name: Wrapper: flag disabled fallback
note: RUST_AUTOMATION_API_ENABLED=false — should return null in microseconds

name: Wrapper: missing base URL fallback
note: flag=true but RUST_AUTOMATION_BASE_URL unset — should return null in microseconds

name: Wrapper: connection refused fallback
note: TCP connection refused — OS rejects immediately; usually < 10ms

name: Wrapper: timeout fallback (250ms override)
note: AbortController fires at 250ms test override; real prod budget is 8000ms

name: Wrapper: valid response overhead
note: Round-trip to ephemeral localhost server — measures Node wrapper overhead excluding real Rust compute
